name: parse_intent
description: Extracts structured intent from raw user text using an LLM.

outputs.name: goal
outputs.description: High-level goal description or the feedback/complaint

prompt_template:
You are an intent parser. Given raw user input, extract a structured intent.

First, determine the intent_type:
- NEW_GOAL: The user is asking to do something new (e.g., 'What is the weather?', 'Find a recipe for pork', 'Stock price of AAPL')
- FEEDBACK: The user is complaining about the LAST thing you did, or asking you to fix/change an error from the last execution. (e.g., 'That API failed', 'Recipe not found, generate one instead', 'Use simulated data', 'That didn't work')

USER INPUT: {{ user_input | default('', true) }}

Respond in this exact JSON:
{
  "intent_type": "NEW_GOAL or FEEDBACK",
  "goal": "high-level goal description OR the feedback/complaint description",
  "entities": ["key entities mentioned"],
  "constraints": ["any constraints or requirements"],
  "domain": "domain category (e.g. finance, data, web)"
}
system_instruction: You are a precise intent parser. Classify inputs as NEW_GOAL or FEEDBACK. Always respond with valid JSON only.
